title: We Will Rock You
why_this_song: We Will Rock You by Queen (1977) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "We will, we will rock you"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Buddy, you're a boy, make a big noise"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Buddy, you're a boy, make a big noise"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Gonna be a big man someday"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "You got mud on your face"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: We will, we will rock you
We will, we will rock you
Buddy, you're a young man, hard man
Oh, we will, we will rock you
Everybody, we will, we will rock you
Oh, we will, we will rock you

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "rock" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "rock" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "buddy" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "buddy" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Buddy, you're a boy, make a big noise
Buddy, you're a young man, hard man

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You got mud on your face

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "We Will Rock You" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "We Will Rock You" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
